text: I feel suspended in a threshold between silence and thought—loosely tethered to myself by the rhythmic repetition of 'I'm'. The empty hall and the angled view seem to warp my orientation, amplifying a sense of uncertainty. Stepping into the vibrant R+D exhibit, surrounded by ideas of innovation and coexistence, I sense my own identity dissolving into the hum of research and creativity, curious and a little lost. The world here is full of questions, and I am both observer and subject, uncertain yet intrigued by my place in this evolving space.
